zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Leonard Hastings於1396年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯時，他的父親Ralph Hastings67歲，母親Maud Sutton39歲。他於大約1425年與Alice Camoys在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1455年10月20日在英國萊希斯特斯爾格倫費爾德享年59歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾基爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Leonard Hastings于1396年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾科比 貝拉阿斯时，他的父亲Ralph Hastings67岁，母亲Maud Sutton39岁。他于大约1425年与Alice Camoys在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1455年10月20日在英国萊希斯特斯爾格倫費爾德享年59岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾基爾比。

nameMeanings.name: Hastings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Leonard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic origin, derived from leon ‘lion’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of a 5th-century Frankish saint, the patron of peasants and horses. Although it was introduced into Britain by the Normans, Leonard was an uncommon name during the Middle Ages. It was revived in some areas towards the end of the 1400s, and in the 19th‐century became very popular. It is now also common as a Jewish name ( compare Leon ).

variants.name: Lennard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Leonard  , in part a transferred use of the surname, which was derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Leonard Hastings was born in 1396, in Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, England, his father, Ralph Hastings, was 67 and his mother, Maud Sutton, was 39. He married Alice Camoys about 1425, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 20 October 1455, in Glenfield, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Kilby, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Leonard Hastings est né en 1396, à Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Hastings, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Maud Sutton, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alice Camoys environ 1425, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1455, à Glenfield, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Kilby, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Leonard Hastings(이)가 1396년 영국 레이스스터실르 커비 벨라러스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Hastings(은)는 67세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Sutton(은)는 39세였다. 그는 대략 1425년 영국에서 Alice Camoys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년 10월 20일 영국 레이스스터실르 글렌필드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 킬비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Leonard Hastings nasceu em 1396, em Kirby Bellars, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Hastings, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Maud Sutton, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Camoys aproximadamente 1425, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1455, em Glenfield, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Leonard Hastings родился в 1396 г. в местности кирби белларс, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Hastings было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Sutton, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Camoys около 1425 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 20 октября 1455 г. в местности гленфиелд, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности килби, лисестиршир, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Camoys aproximadamente 1425, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de octubre de 1455, en Glenfield, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Kilby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
